voters.comment: RUROUNI RONI!!!!

voters.name: Steve
voters.comment: As a kid, we had a wide range TV antenna that could sometimes pick up channels from far away on a clear day. One time we picked up a French channel from Canada and they just happened to be airing an episode of Rurouni Kenshin. I remember being absolutely mesmerized by this song, watching the opening through fuzzy static. Definitely drums up some great childhood memories!
